examples: They competed with skill and tenacity.
One person must prepare for it with the same tenacity and quickness as one does for a fencing tournament or a chess match.
Talent, hard work and sheer tenacity are all crucial to career success.
Once a team has demonstrated courage and humility, it takes tenacity to ultimately trump the competition.
The inevitable happened just after the half-hour, when Smith demonstrated his tenacity and eye for goal.
